name: Images Slider
summary: A full-screen image slider with scale/rotate transitions, keyboard navigation, and autoplay functionality.
detailedDescription: Images Slider creates an immersive full-screen image carousel with AnimatePresence transitions. Images preload on mount using Promise.all, storing loaded images array. Current index state tracks active image, with next/previous functions cycling through array (wrapping at boundaries). Keyboard navigation listens for ArrowRight/ArrowLeft events. Autoplay triggers handleNext every 5 seconds when enabled. Slide variants use Framer Motion: initial state (scale 0, opacity 0, rotateX 45deg), visible state (scale 1, rotateX 0, opacity 1) with 0.5s duration and easing [0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1.0]. Direction prop controls 'up' or 'down' slide animation. Overlay option renders children content over images with configurable className. The component creates cinematic image presentation ideal for hero sections, portfolios, or any context where full-screen image transitions with smooth scale/rotate effects enhance visual storytelling.
behavior: Animates scale from 0 to 1 on enter
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
